inputs.label: Bileşim Sıklığı (Adet/Yıl)
inputs.businessContext: Faizin yılda kaç kez eklendiği (12: aylık).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of compounding periods per year (12=monthly).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Faizin yılda kaç kez eklendiği (12: aylık).
businessContext_i18n.de: Number of compounding periods per year (12=monthly).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Number of compounding periods per year (12=monthly).
businessContext_i18n.es: Number of compounding periods per year (12=monthly).
businessContext_i18n.ar: Number of compounding periods per year (12=monthly).

rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

formulas.sonuc: anapara * Math.pow(1 + (faiz / 100) / Math.max(1, siklik), siklik * yil)

suggestedActions: Verify inputs before making financial decisions.
Consult a licensed financial advisor for personalized advice.
